allowed_uses: record visible lead-trader or portfolio metadata if publicly available
design an offline replay model for historical actions or allocations
retain risk and survivorship caveats beside any hypothesis
bias_risks: hidden leverage, fees, risk limits, and liquidation behavior
copied trade sizing may not be recoverable from public data
notes: This plan is design-only because copy trading can imply live account behavior.
Public performance cannot be imported as strategy evidence.

allocation_or_trade_timestamp_semantics.value: FAQ states copied portfolios duplicate lead-trader trades in real time; some detail pages state figures are refreshed every 1-2 hours.

copy_controls_present.value: Public copy-trading pages advertise replicating lead-trader portfolios and one-click copy behavior.

leader_or_portfolio_identifier.value: Public lead-trader and portfolio surfaces expose lead-trader or portfolio identifiers when detail pages are visible.

visible_performance_window.value: Public copy-trading surfaces expose performance windows such as 7-day ROI/PnL on some lead-trader detail pages.

visible_risk_metrics.value: Public surfaces can expose maximum drawdown, Sharpe ratio, win rate, AUM, profit share, and minimum copy amount fields.

source_title: Binance Copy Trading public lead-trader surface
validation_prerequisites: reconstructable historical actions or explicit non-reconstructable status
local replay on frozen market data where possible
divergence model before any future paper copy comparison
human gate before any account-specific eligibility check
